rationale: The cited paper is not only listed as related hospitality/franchising work; it is also invoked as a methodological precedent. In the chain-premium estimation section, the author explicitly notes that the identification strategy using properties that switch affiliation and property fixed effects is the same as Tsai, Dev, and Chintagunta (2015). That indicates this citation helps justify the empirical design, not just provide background context.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a switcher-based hotel panel identification approach associated with Tsai et al. to estimate chain-affiliation value over time. It repurposes that empirical logic for a different focal question, namely how online reputation mechanisms affect the chain premium.
